title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5391 / 58 OG No. 16, 3323 (April 16, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3301, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sums appropriated in Priorities Numbered 50, 52, 60 and 61, page 58-B, group II, for the Province of Leyte, appendix B of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, to wit:

"50

Bato

katipunan

Construction

P20,000.00

"52

Bato

Tabunoc

Construction

2,000.00

"60

Bato

Mabini

Construction

2,000.00

"61

Bato

Naga

Construction

2,000.00

totalling eight thousand pesos, are hereby reappropriated, for the construction and/or improvement of the Central School in the Municipality of Bato, Province of Leyte.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
